results.title: HKSAR V. CHUI WAI KEUNG
results.coram: Before: His Honour Judge Clement Lee
results.charge: Offences: [1] Assault occasioning actual bodily harm（襲擊他人致造成身體傷害） [2] Possession of arms without a licence（無牌管有槍械） [3] Possession of instruments fit for unlawful purposes（管有適合作非法用途的工具）
results.representations: Present: Mr Jimmy Ma, Counsel on Fiat, for HKSAR/Director of Public Prosecutions Mr James Wong, instructed by Messrs Katherine Y.W. Or & Co, assigned by the Director of Legal Aid, for the defendant

results.title: HKSAR V. CHEUNG CHUN FU
results.coram: Before: Hon Barnes J in Court
results.parties: BETWEEN HKSAR and CHEUNG Chun-Fu (3 rd Defendant)
results.representations: Ms Juliana HL Chow, Counsel on fiat and Mr Lau Wan-cheung and Mr Ng Wing-kit, Senior Public Prosecutors of the Department of Justice, for HKSAR Mr Dick KF Lee and Mr Kelvin CH Yu, instructed by CHENG & CO, for the defendant CHEUNG Chun-fu

results.title: 香港特別行政區 訴 張俊富
results.coram: 主審法官: 高等法院原訟法庭法官張慧玲
results.parties: 香港特別行政區 訴 張俊富 (第三被告人)
results.representations: 控方：由外聘大律師周凱靈及律政司高級檢控官劉允祥及伍永杰代表香港特別行政區 辯方：由鄭國洪律師事務所轉聘李國輔大律師及于雋謙大律師，代表張俊富
